Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x2DFA "TREASUREOFTHEPHOENIX-1000-2DFA" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $1000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Treasure of the Phoenix.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
This game has a BASIC program to provide instructions before the main game loads. Therefore an init routine has been added at $1000 which: 1. Sets up the correct VICII settings and necessary BASIC pointers. 2. Disables the RUN/STOP key by modifying the STOP vector by setting $E1 at $0328. 3. Executes the RUN command to start the command to start the intro program.
Note: The LOAD statement on line number 340 of the BASIC intro program has been changed to SYS 11770 so as to jump to the entry point of $2DFA once the intro has finished.
